title: Shadcn UI Admin
description: Shadcn UI Admin is a modern and responsive admin dashboard template built with React, Shadcn UI, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. It is a fully functional admin dashboard that includes a variety of features and components that can be used to build your own admin dashboard.

title: Edu-Learn (LMS Platform)
description: Edu-Learn is a modern and responsive learning management system built with React, Shadcn UI, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. It is a fully functional learning management system that includes a variety of features and components that can be used to build your own learning management system.

title: Fly Bird Game
description: Fly Bird Game is a modern turn based strategy game built with JavaScript, HTML5, Css & Phaser 3. It is a fully functional turn based strategy game that includes a variety of features and components that can be used to build your own turn based strategy game.

title: Luna Shop (E-commerce)
description: လှပပြီး feature စုံတဲ့ e-commerce UI ပရိုဂျက်။ Shadcn UI နဲ့ Puzzle Accounting API ချိတ်ဆက်ထားပါတယ်။
